MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT EMPIRE PEREZ, LLC'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

The unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is granted.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2025 Continued To Sep-03-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Continued To Jul-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES:
This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendants Empire Perez LLC, Green Clean Medicine, Casa Cannabis, Anthony Hicks.

Dept:505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:57:28 a.m. and concluding at 10:01:51 a.m.(D505)

Sabrina Beg, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Charu Dave who was present, placed under oath but did not testify via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Green Clean Medicine, Casa Cannabis, Anthony Hicks not appearing.
Zien Halwani, Esq. representing Defendant Empire Perez LLC via Zoom Video Conference.

The Court continues this matter pursuant to Defendant Empire Perez LLC's motion to set aside default set in Department 301 on July 10, 2025.

The request for default judgment is continued to July 23, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505.
